Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.tests

package org.eventb.core.seqprover.tests
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.eventb.core.seqprover
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AbstractProofTreeTests
    Common implementation for tests related to proof trees.
    HypActionTests
    Test class for IHypAction implementations.
    PredicateDecomposerTests
    Unit tests for class PredicateDecomposer: decomposition in subgoals of predicates.
    ProofDependenciesTests
    Unit tests for proof dependencies.
    ProofDependenciesTests.DependencyMatcher
    Represents expected dependencies built one piece at a time with reasonable defaults.
    ProofRuleTests
    Unit tests for Proof Rules and their application Also tests that sequent modification and hypothesis actions behave as expected from an external point of view
    ProofTreeDeltaTests
    Unit tests for deltas fired when modifying proof trees.
    ProofTreeTests
    Unit tests for classes ProofTree and ProofTreeNode: basic manipulations of proof trees.
    ProverChecksTests
    Test cases for the static methods in ProverChecks.
    ProverLibTests
    Tests about ProverLib functions.
    ProverLibTests.ProofSkeletonWithMissingRule
     
    ProverLibTests.ValidProofSkeleton
     
    ProverSequentTests
    Unit tests for Prover Sequents
    RebuildTests
    Acceptance tests for checking proof rebuild in the presence of useless rules.
    RebuildTests.UnreusableSkeleton
    Wrapper class for a proof skeleton, that returns exactly the same skeleton, except for the reasoner versions which are systematically changed to prevent reuse.
    RewriteHypActionTacticTest
    Ensures that IHypAction.IRewriteHypAction which is involved by Generalize Modus Ponens tactic is not erroneously reused.
    TestLib
    This is a collection of static methods for conveniently constructing objects used for testing using their string counterparts.
    TypeCheckerTests
    Unit tests for the type-checker class.
    TypeTests
    Acceptance tests for checking type consistency in a proof tree.
    Util
    Utility class for writing tests.
